title: K'NEX | 6 Foot Ferris Wheel | Kids Building Set for Creative Play, Hours of Fun Making Giant ferris wheel, Suitable for Boys and Girls Ages 9+ | Basic Fun 89790
features: BUILD A 6 FOOT FERRIS WHEEL: This building set comes with 550 pieces and a plug in motor to build a 6 foot high ferris wheel. This building set provides hours of fun colour-coding while encouraging children to let their creativity run free

EASY TO BUILD: This toy building set comes with a colour coded instruction manual. Follow the instructions and build your own Ferris Wheel! Ferris Wheel building success is as easy as a snap and a click

EDUCATIONAL TOY: This construction set helps strengthen fine motor skills, logical thinking and problem solving. Perfect for capturing Adults and teens interest in basic construction, science and design, while promoting concentration and logical thinking

IDEAL GIFT FOR TEENs AND ADULTS: A great birthday gift or Christmas present for everybody! This Ferris Wheel building set is a great gift for Teens and Adults looking for new challenges. This 6 foot high ferris wheel building set for teens opens the door for hours of creative design play
description: Product Description K'NEX 6 Foot Ferris Wheel Safety Warning keep away from naked flame
